name: xf_cep_c_del_churn_exists_rule
drl:
rule NE when exists E0() P() then end
rule CH salience -10 when $t : Trig() $w : E0(tag=="z") then delete($w); insert(new E0(21, "y")); delete($t); end
_finding: CLASS 3 rule-driven variant: a RULE RHS delete($w); insert(new witness) ALSO re-fires the exists in Drools (NE,CH,NE) but not the engine (NE,CH) — the churn re-fire is NOT external-specific, it is any EXPLICIT (non-expiration) delete. Same root as xf_cep_c_del_churn_exists; needs the existential right-phase-order model_check sub-recon.
